label: Drug policy
description: Defines which drugs colonists are allowed to use and under what conditions. Controls pleasure-drug blanket allowance and per-drug scheduling rules.

allowPleasureDrugs.label: Allow pleasure drugs
allowPleasureDrugs.description: When true, all drugs classified as pleasure drugs are allowed for joy without requiring individual entries. Does not affect addiction management or scheduling.

entries.label: Entries
entries.description: Per-drug scheduling rules. Each list item controls whether a specific drug is allowed for addiction treatment, recreational joy, or timed automatic scheduling.

empty-drug-policy.label: Empty drug policy
empty-drug-policy.description: Policy that prohibits all drugs. No entries or pleasure-drug override.

pleasure-drugs-policy.label: Pleasure drugs policy
pleasure-drugs-policy.description: Policy that allows all pleasure drugs for joy without per-drug entries.

custom-entry-policy.label: Custom entry policy
custom-entry-policy.description: Policy with a per-drug entries list. Add one <li> per drug.
